page_metadata.biotools__summary: Platform-independent software program designed to infer species trees from incongruent multi-copy gene trees using a generalization of the Robinson-Foulds (RF) distance to multi-labeled trees.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Platform-independent software program designed to infer species trees from incongruent multi-copy gene trees using a generalization of the Robinson-Foulds (RF) distance to multi-labeled trees.
